productDisplayName: Red Tape Men's Brown Semi Formal Shoe
description: Take semi-formal dressing to the next level with these slip-on leather shoes from red tape. With comfort and style rolled into one, these shoes work great for people who love to take off and wear their shoes with ease. Upper Full grain leather upper for maximum durability, breathability and style Slip-on system for easy wear and removal Elastic inserts on the sides of the tongue for a snug, customised Fit Stitch detailing to enhance shoe life Curved and padded collar with a fabric inner for comfort Brand badge on tongue for style Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Fabric inner lining for maximum breathability Padded fabric footbed with extra cushioning in the backfoot for all-day comfort Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Brand badge on heel for style Outsole Durable rubber outsole ergonomically designed to offer maximum comfort Flex grooves in the forefoot with a textured mid forefoot and mid heel for grip and traction Raised heel connected to the forefoot by a trusstic shank for absolute support to the midfoot arch Scooped mid heel with a brand badge for cushioned comfort Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style Shoe careWipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
